title: 3D Flipping Card Component

statement.markdown:
## 3D Card Flip Component

Build a card component flipping 180 degrees horizontally.

### Requirements:
1. **3D Transforms**: Implement structural perspective blocks and backface-visibility features.
2. **Hover Toggle**: Hovering/Focusing over card structures flips card faces smoothly.
3. **Front/Back text columns**: Display card front details, transitioning to background instructions on active flips.

constraints: Must implement perspective values in containers and backface-visibility: hidden in card faces
Transitions must execute smoothly without visual clipping

starterCode.html:
Front Content
Back Content

gradingCriteria.description: Verify cards rotate 180 degrees horizontally on hovering events.
Verify back side remains invisible until cards are flipped.
